result.summary: Found a couple of visible issues: the fixed bottom navigation is covering part of the content, and one game tile shows an obviously malformed negative value. There are also some clipped cards at the right edge of the grids that may indicate overflow/layout problems.

issues.description: The sticky bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game row, cutting off the bottoms of the tiles and hiding part of the content.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the page content or reduce the footer height so the last row of cards remains fully visible above the navigation bar.

issues.description: One game tile displays a negative amount, "-$6,266.13", which looks like broken or incorrectly formatted data for a casino jackpot/value label.
issues.suggestion: Verify the source data and formatting logic for the amount badge so it cannot render invalid negative values unless explicitly intended.

issues.description: Several cards and labels are partially clipped on the right side of the screen, leaving the last item in each row only partly visible.
issues.suggestion: Confirm whether these are meant to be swipeable carousels; if not, adjust card sizing/spacing or container overflow so items fit cleanly within the viewport.
